name: Fashion Artisans Collective
summary: House Shelk-aligned fashion network that organizes designers, workshops, apprentices, and cultural showcases.
motive: Preserve Shelk’s artistic prestige while turning fashion into durable political and economic power.
power_relations: Patronized by House Shelk and closely watched by Roadwardens
Connected to merchants, alchemists, and textile suppliers
visible_membership_base: Designers, weavers, dyers, enchanters, apprentices, traveling guild ambassadors.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: Because Shelk reads style as civic seriousness, artistic disputes can become political disputes very quickly.
